creator: carton@Ivy.NET
text:
Thank you VVD, but please read the report more carefully.  The bug exists in 12.1, and a sample bootup of 12.1 is given.  I have mentioned earlier versions simply because I already did the work of bisecting for you.

I will add a disclaimer for the distant future:  since the bug exists in a version that was supported at the time I reported it, please try to reproduce the bug with a supported version before asking me for further help.  If you try to reproduce the bug and are unable, I'm happy to check on my end if I can still reproduce it with whatever version is supported at that future time.  However in the past I've found yearly bug-scrubs, "can you still reproduce this?" without any effort made to fix or reproduce the bug to be very expensive for me and lead nowhere.  I do want to help as much as I can, but probably don't have enough state to fix the bug myself, and if the bug's not getting productive attention I don't want to waste time on it.

HTH and happy hunting.  I hope the bisection helps.

fwiw I was gratified to find such a good workaround in the mean time.
